# Switch
<!-- nib-component: v1 | generated: 2026-03-02 | do not edit manually -->

> A binary on/off toggle control

**Widget type:** `switch`
**WAI-ARIA APG:** [switch pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/switch/)

---

## Anatomy

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `root` | The outer wrapper element |
| `track` | The pill-shaped background track |
| `thumb` | The circular handle that slides |
| `label` | The visible text label |
| `onLabel` | Optional label for the on state |
| `offLabel` | Optional label for the off state |

---

## States

| State | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `default` | Off / unchecked state |
| `on` | On / checked state |
| `focused` | Keyboard or programmatic focus (focus ring) |
| `disabled` | Not interactive (aria-disabled) |
| `on-disabled` | On state and non-interactive (aria-disabled) |

---

## Variants

- `default` — Standard toggle switch
- `small` — Compact version for dense layouts
## Accessibility

**ARIA role:** `switch`
**Focus behavior:** receives-focus
**Focus trap:** No
**Required label:** Yes (visible-label-or-aria-labelledby)
**Touch target minimum:** 44pt iOS / 48dp Android / 24px web

### Keyboard Interaction

| Key | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| `Space` | Toggles the switch between on and off |
| `Enter` | Toggles the switch between on and off |
| `Tab` | Move focus to the switch |
| `Shift+Tab` | Move focus away from the switch |

### ARIA Attributes

- `aria-checked`
- `aria-label`
- `aria-labelledby`
- `aria-disabled`

---

## Token Bindings

```json
{
  "track": {
    "default": {
      "background": "switch.track.bg",
      "border-radius": "switch.track.radius"
    },
    "on": {
      "background": "switch.track.bg.on"
    },
    "focused": {
      "outline-color": "color.focus.ring",
      "outline-width": "2px"
    },
    "disabled": {
      "background": "color.surface.disabled"
    }
  },
  "thumb": {
    "default": {
      "background": "switch.thumb.bg"
    },
    "on": {
      "background": "switch.thumb.bg.on"
    }
  }
}
```
